# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

apiVersion: envoy.config.listener.v2
kind: Listener
name: api-gateway-http
address: {"socket_address": { "host_name": "0.0.0.0", "port_value": 80 }}
filterChains:
  - filters:
    - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
      typedConfig:
        "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
        stat_prefix: api-gateway
        codec_system: BOOST_ASIO
        http1_protocol_options:
          upgrade_timeout: 0s
        routeConfiguration:
          name: api-routes
          virtualHosts:
            - name: api-gateway-vhost
              domains: ["*"]
              routes:
                - match: {"route.prefix": "/api/(?<service_name>.+)"}
                  routeAction:
                    cluster: ${service_name}
        transportSocket:
          name: envoy.transport_sockets.tls
          typedConfig:
            "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transports.tls.v3.TransportSslContext
            commonTlsContext:
              tlsVersions: ["TLS12", "TLS11", "TLS1"]
              minProtocolVersion: TLS_VERSION_1_0
              alwaysPerformClientAuth: true
        connectionPool:
          maxConnectionsPerRoute: 1000
          maxRequestsPerConnection: 2000
        healthyEndpointChecks:
          - envoy.healthcheck.v3.HttpHealthCheck
            hosts:
              - socket_address: {"address": "localhost", "port_value": 80}
            interval: 5s
            timeout: 1s

apiVersion: envoy.config.cluster.v2
kind: Cluster
name: api-service-1
connectTimeout: 0.25s
type: strict_dns
lbPolicy: round_robin
loadAssignment:
  clusterName: api-service-1
  endpoints:
    - lbEndpoint:
        hostIdentifier: "{{ Service IP }}"
        socketAddress: {"address": "{{ Service IP }}", "port_value": 80}
